WebSweep
  • Contribute
  • Edit on GitHub

Contribute

This project is developed and maintained by the ODISSEI Social Data Science (SoDa) team and the FIRMBACKBONE Project.

Any contributions you make to WebSweep are greatly appreciated.

How to Contribute

Whether you’re fixing a bug, adding a new feature, or improving the documentation, your contribution is welcome. For more information on how to report issues, submit pull requests, and contribute to WebSweep in general, please see our CONTRIBUTING file.

The contribution file outlines the process we’d like contributors to follow to help maintain the quality and consistency of the project.

Developing WebSweep

For instructions on how to run WebSweep without installing it and how to install it from source, please refer to our DEVELOPMENT guide. This guide provides all the necessary steps to get you started with developing and testing WebSweep on your local environment.

Contact and Support

If you have any questions or need support, feel free to reach out. You can file an issue in our issue tracker or contact the team directly through the ODISSEI SoDa contact form.
